_about.purpose: Seed index of confirmed Bold vendor pricelists and reference budgets in Google Drive, for the bold-proposal-builder vendor-quote auto-sync at session start. Not the live registry. A starter scaffold for Hemi to confirm, correct, and promote to vendor-registry.json.
_about.status: SEED. category_guess fields are best-guess from filename only and require Hemi confirmation. file_id values verified via Google Drive MCP on 2026-05-22.
discovery_notes: Handoff folder id 0B7TFmdvhXcItS1JxM2xIZG5YeUU resolves; contents are Bold project archive root (year folders 2012-2026 plus client folders), not a vendor folder.

Handoff folder id 0B7TFmdvhXcItZnVaVllQZmZOS0U returns 'File not found' on metadata calls. It is a DELETED folder. The list endpoint returns an empty array, which is what was observed in the previous session.
Bold has no single canonical vendor-quote folder. Vendor pricelists are scattered across per-vendor folders. Most reliable harvest: name-pattern search across Drive for 'מחירון' and 'הצעת מחיר'.
Real supplier costs Hemi has actually used live in his recent project budget XLSXes (תקציב). These are the highest-fidelity source for current rates.
v0_2_0_changes: Added 'מזון ושתיה' (F&B) as a 7th budget category, sitting between 'כח אדם ולוגיסטיקה' and 'שונות'.
Wine ('יין') and bar ('בר') items are part of F&B; the legacy 'יינות' / 'יין' / 'בר' lines move from 'שונות' to 'מזון ושתיה'.
Reclassified kerem_barak_breakfast, kerem_barak_tour, and the legacy wine pricelists into 'מזון ושתיה'.
Added companion file extracted-prices.seed.json with 116 supplier-cost and client-unit-price line items extracted from Tzion 3 v03, MAN 2025 (Sorek + Beit HaDvash), and Phoenix 5-10.10.26 budgets.

category_notes.מזון ושתיה: Covers wine (יין), bar (בר), catering, F&B labor on the bar, glassware, and any beverage/food line. Bar STRUCTURE ('מבנה בר') is also tagged here in Phoenix and MAN, though it could arguably belong to 'טכני' as physical buildout.

project_archive_root.notes: Project archive root. Year subfolders 2012 through 2026 plus client folders (Efrat, אורי, אלישבע and others).

second_handoff_folder_DELETED.notes: DELETED folder. 'File not found' on get_file_metadata; list_folder_contents returns empty array. Was probably a real folder before Drive's 2017 ID format migration and was deleted afterward. Drop from any sync logic.

queries: name contains 'הצעת מחיר' and trashed = false and modifiedTime > '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z'
vendor_pricelists.filter: Drop docs whose filename indicates a quote Bold sent OUT to a client (e.g. names containing 'אשרמן', 'פינוי בינוי', 'הטייסים', 'טכנופארק', 'מעונות ים', personal-name suffixes). Keep docs whose filename indicates a vendor sent rates IN to Bold.

queries: name contains 'תקציב' and trashed = false and modifiedTime > '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'
reference_budgets.filter: Keep Bold-authored event budget XLSXes. These hold the real supplier costs Hemi has used recently and are the highest-fidelity source for live unit-cost rates.

vendor_pricelists.notes: Bold's own rate card from 2018. .msg requires special parsing (Outlook MIME). Stale; treat as historical baseline only.
Loose file at the archive root, stale (2019). Refresh if still in use.

reference_budgets.notes: Companion DOCX: 1MO14Qr9aqjvLEZ4fU0QdZ4nORz-vja7e. Authoritative recent budget for a known Bold client. Only client unit prices exposed. Lines extracted to extracted-prices.seed.json.

Latest revision in a v01/v02/v03 series. Exposes BOTH 'עלות יחידה' (supplier cost) and 'מחיר יחידה' (client price); highest-fidelity supplier-cost source. Lines extracted to extracted-prices.seed.json.
Parent folder '01 - תקציב ופיננסים' indicates Bold's modern numbered subfolder convention for project finance.
Sales day at Sorek. Client prices only. Lines extracted to extracted-prices.seed.json.

open_questions: Locate the 'קרן' folder Hemi referenced. No client/project folder named קרן exists under the 2024/2025/2026 year roots, nor in Efrat - 2025. Please provide its folder id (or owner email if it lives in someone else's Drive).
Confirm the category_guess for each vendor pricelist. Several remain ambiguous: catamaran and Rosh HaNikra could stay 'שונות' or move to a future 'פעילות אורחים' (experiences) category.
Confirm that 'מבנה בר' (bar STRUCTURE) belongs under 'מזון ושתיה' and not 'טכני'. Currently in extracted-prices.seed.json it sits under 'מזון ושתיה'.
Decide whether the Bold internal 2018 rate card (.msg) should be parsed and promoted to a baseline, or retired.

Decide whether to promote extracted-prices.seed.json into a live unit-cost-registry.json that build_budget_xlsx.py reads. Conversion needed for client_unit_price entries: supplier_cost = client_unit_price / 1.15 to back out the layer-1 markup.
